This workspace adapts "One Skill to Rule Them All" / "Task Observer" by
Eoghan Henn (https://rebelytics.com).

Upstream repository:
https://github.com/rebelytics/one-skill-to-rule-them-all

Retain attribution when reusing or adapting this skill further.
